title: dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. pycnantha
intro: Dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. pycnantha, also known as Traunstein's marsh orchid, is a subspecies of orchid that belongs to the Dactylorhiza genus. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. pycnantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and dried extracts, although further research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic applications.
